## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, SEO optimization, and workflow improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/k_MdUJay7PksQppEwGEGoEivQRHVjipe?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Strapi fact-checker working well for Strapi-specific content; exploring solutions for web developer knowledge gaps](https://fathom.video/share/k_MdUJay7PksQppEwGEGoEivQRHVjipe?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [New comparison page template proposed; discussing implementation and maintenance strategies](https://fathom.video/share/k_MdUJay7PksQppEwGEGoEivQRHVjipe?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [Focus on long-tail use cases for Strapi to showcase versatility and improve SEO rankings](https://fathom.video/share/k_MdUJay7PksQppEwGEGoEivQRHVjipe?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
  - [Exploring curated content approach for blog posts to increase volume and quality of published articles](https://fathom.video/share/k_MdUJay7PksQppEwGEGoEivQRHVjipe?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)

## Topics

### Strapi Fact Checker and Content Accuracy

  - [Fact checker effectively catches Strapi-specific content errors](https://fathom.video/share/k_MdUJay7PksQppEwGEGoEivQRHVjipe?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [Exploring solutions for highly technical web developer knowledge gaps](https://fathom.video/share/k_MdUJay7PksQppEwGEGoEivQRHVjipe?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [Currently using human reviewers to catch nuanced technical issues](https://fathom.video/share/k_MdUJay7PksQppEwGEGoEivQRHVjipe?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Theo's technical expertise valuable for content review](https://fathom.video/share/k_MdUJay7PksQppEwGEGoEivQRHVjipe?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)

### Content Production and Workflow

  - [Exploring options for maintaining comparison page data (spreadsheet vs. Airtable)](https://fathom.video/share/k_MdUJay7PksQppEwGEGoEivQRHVjipe?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)

  - [Discussing inclusion of Strapi in all comparisons for consistent referencing](https://fathom.video/share/k_MdUJay7PksQppEwGEGoEivQRHVjipe?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
